title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at S.R. Batliboi - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at S.R. Batliboi - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
S.R. Batliboi is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About S.R. Batliboi:
S.R. Batliboi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.R. Batliboi!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
